title: acrostichum virens var. costatum
intro: Acrostichum virens var. costatum, also known as the mangrove fern, is a variant of the Acrostichum virens species, a type of epiphytic fern commonly found in tropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate congestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. In terms of herbal preparations, Acrostichum virens var. costatum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used in capsules or powders.
